chunks.text: ORDER SHEET THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P No.S-371 of 2025. ------------------------------------------------------------------- Date: Order with signature(s) of the Judge(s) ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------ Hg/Priority 1. For Orders on Office Objection No.1 to 5 a/w reply as at ‘A’. 2. For Hearing of CMA No.3636/2025. 3. Hearing of Main Case. 30th May, 2025. Mr. Abdul Samad Khattak advocate for the petitioner. Mr. Khalid Mehmood Ali advocate for respondent No.5. ************ Through instant petition, petitioners have prayed for: i. To direct the respondent No.1 to respondent No.4 to provide protection to the petitioners against the illegal, unlawful acts of the respondent No.5, 6 & 7 by avoiding lodgment of FIR anywhere in the province of Sindh. ii. To direct the respondent No.1 & 2 to provide the details of the criminal cases/FIRs against the petitioner in any district of interior of Sindh. iii. To direct the respondent No.5, 6 & 7 restrain from misusing his resources for initiating malicious and false FIR against the family members of the petitioners anywhere in the province of Sindh. iv. To grant other and better relief which this court deem fit and proper in the circumstances of the case. Respondent No.5, along with his counsel, is present in Court and undertakes that he will not lodge any FIR against the petitioners or cause any harassment to them, and that he shall act strictly in accordance with the law. A similar statement has also been made by the petitioners. The statements are found to be tenable, and this petition is accordingly liable to be disposed of in terms of the undertaking given by Respondent No.5.

A similar statement has also been made by the petitioners. The statements are found to be tenable, and this petition is accordingly liable to be disposed of in terms of the undertaking given by Respondent No.5. However, it is clarified that if there exists any private or civil dispute between the parties, the same shall be dealt with by the competent court or forum. This Court shall not enter into such disputes and leaves it to the appropriate forum to redress the grievance, if approached, in accordance with law. In view of the above, this petition is disposed of with a direction to the SHO of Police Station Sohrab Goth to provide protection to the petitioners and their family members in accordance with law.. JUDGE M.Zeeshan
